name: Tan Teck Seng Electric (Co) Pte Ltd
message: Tan Teck Seng Electric (Co) Pte Ltd, founded in 1973. The company specializes in the supply of electrical products, including:Steel and flexible pipesCable support systemsLightning protection and grounding systemsCable entries and lugsThe main clients are electrical engineering contractors and companies related to the construction industry in Singapore.http://tts.sg/
